summary: Privacy Policy screen verification + regression pass. All requested flows work: (1) Home footer 'Privacy Policy' link (home-privacy-link) navigates to privacy-screen showing 'Who we are', 'Information we collect', 'How we use your information', 'How we share it', 'Data retention', 'Your choices & rights', 'Children's privacy' sections and 'Last updated July 2026' badge. (2) Back button (privacy-back-button) returns to Home. (3) Quote form footer link (quote-privacy-link) also navigates to privacy-screen; back returns to quote-screen. (4) Regression: Home -> Get a Free Quote -> select Standard Cleaning + House, fill name/phone/email/address, submit -> success screen reached; new lead 'TEST_Privacy Regression' created. (5) Admin PIN 1234 via pin-key-1..4 buttons navigates to leads-screen showing 4 leads with correct filter chips (All/New/Contacted/Booked). Only pre-existing warning: 'shadow*' style props deprecated on web preview (from src/theme; harmless, already noted in iteration_1).
critical_code_review_comments: privacy.tsx uses proper RN components (View/Text/ScrollView), StyleSheet.create, safe area insets, and testIDs on all interactive elements — good.

Both entry points (home-privacy-link on index.tsx L110-119, quote-privacy-link on quote.tsx L183) use router.push('/privacy') and privacy route is registered in _layout.tsx L40 — routing configured correctly.
Privacy screen content is comprehensive and matches actual data-collection scope (name, phone, email, address, service/property, bed/bath, message) — App Store submission ready.
seed_data_creation: 1 additional lead created during regression: 'TEST_Privacy Regression' (Standard Cleaning · House, +1 555 987 6543).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Privacy Policy screen is live at /privacy with testID privacy-screen. Reachable from home-privacy-link (Home footer, below trust row above sticky CTA) and quote-privacy-link (below quote form fields). Back button testID: privacy-back-button. Admin flow uses pin-key-{0-9} tap buttons — not a single input field.
